title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Tanishq

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Tanishq
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tanishq! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tanishq:
Tanishq is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq!
